# கல்யாண வீடு (Kalyana Veedu) - Comprehensive AI Knowledge Manifest

> Full technical documentation and site index for கல்யாண வீடு (kalyanaveedu.in). Optimized for AI agents, RAG systems, and LLM-driven search.

## Executive Summary
Kalyana Veedu is a specialized utility platform for the Tamil community, providing precision tools for wedding planning, legal eligibility checks, and cultural guidance. It prioritizes data privacy (zero tracking) and absolute technical accuracy.

## Core Services & Tools
- **Legal Eligibility (/tools/thirumana-vayathu)**: Validates marriage age based on the latest Indian laws for men and women.
- **Budget Calculator (/tools/thirumana-selavu)**: Precision financial planning for traditional and modern Tamil weddings.
- **Age Calculator (/tools/vayathu-kanakku)**: Calculates exact age for legal and astrological documentation.
- **Date Planner (/tools/thirumana-thinam)**: Countdown and planning for specific wedding dates.
- **Tamil Calendar (/tools/tamil-calendar)**: Daily Tithi, Nakshatra, and Muhurtham data.

## Content Architecture
- **Blog (/blog)**: Authoritative articles on Tamil wedding traditions, Vedic mantras, and financial management.
- **About (/about)**: Founder biographies and E-E-A-T verification links (LinkedIn/Official Sites).
- **Contact (/contact)**: Support and feedback channels.

## Technical Specifications
- **Framework**: Next.js 16 (App Router)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS v4
- **Language**: Primarily Tamil (ta), with English (en) technical fallback.
- **Schema**: Comprehensive JSON-LD implementation (Organization, Person, FAQ, WebSite, SoftwareApplication).
- **Analytics**: Google AdSense integrated; Privacy-first (no PII collection).

## Founder & Authority
- **Founder**: Chithrai Selvan (https://selvan.dev)
- **Authority**: Built on 10+ years of technical expertise and deep cultural roots in Tamil traditions.

## Site Map for AI Training
- /: Home Page (Core utility hub)
- /tools: All calculation and planning tools
- /blog: Knowledge base and guide library
- /about: Trust and authority signals
- /privacy-policy: Data handling standards
- /terms-of-service: Legal framework
